Heroic Path-Avenger — Male Erenlander Human Rogue: 16
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 17 (+3) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 9 (-1) Charisma: 13 (+1)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: Avenger Alignment: Lawful Good
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Constitution: 2; Intelligence: 3; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 212243/225000 Level: 16 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 4 from any)
Human Ability Adjustment: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Study The Target: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Intelligence)
Unseen Lurker: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Wisdom)
Ability Boosts: 8 to distribute
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient ability rolls
Second-Story Work: Can climb at full Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +5
Feat Count: General: 6; Heroic: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Roguish Archetype)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement: 2; Deadly Strike: 1; Lurk: 1; Silencing Strike: 1; Study The Target: 1; Unseen Lurker: 1 Erenlander Human Features: Erenlander Skills; Human Ability Adjustment; Human Feat Bonus; Human Skills Rogue Features: Armor Proficiency (Light); Blindsense; Cunning Action; Evasion; Expertise (Rogue); Fast Hands; Reliable Talent; Roguish Archetype; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Performance, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Slippery Mind; Sneak Attack; Supreme Sneak; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Use Magic Device; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Hand Crossbow; Longsword; Rapier; Shortsword) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Human Feat Bonus: +1 general feat
Roguish Archetype: 1 selection
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) -1 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) -1 Intimidation: (cha) +11 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +6 Religion: (int) +1
Athletics: (str) +8 Medicine: (wis) -1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +11 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +13
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +9 Survival: (wis) -1
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Deception; Intimidation; Investigation; Perception; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Deception; Intimidation; Perception; Stealth
Tool Proficiency: Carpenter's Tools; Land Vehicles; Thieves' Tools
Languages: Erenlander; Trader's Tongue
Skill Notes:
Erenlander Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)/Tool Proficiency (Land Vehicles; Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Expertise (Rogue): Expertise (Choose 4 from any Skill, Thieves' Tools)
Human Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)/Language (Erenlander; Choose 1 from any)
Blindsense: R10' Knows the location of hidden and invisible creatures
Lurk: Successful Stealth vs. passive Perception makes self unnoticed and gives advantage on Perception to overhear nearby conversations
Second-Story Work: +3' running jump distance
Study The Target: Successful Investigation (DC 10 + the number of target Hit Dice) after 8 hr observation and research gives advantage on Deception and Stealth to gain access to the target
Supreme Sneak: Has advantage on Stealth when moving at half speed
Thieves'Cant: Understands jargon and signs known only by rogues
Unseen Lurker: Becomes invisible during Lurk and can Lurk during combat
Use Magic Device: Ignores class, race, and level restrictions on magic device use
Combat
Hit Points: 66 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 13
Armor Proficiency: Light Weapon Proficiency: Battleaxe; Hand Crossbow; Longsword; Rapier; Shortsword; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Club (+8 1d4+3 B); Hand Crossbow (+8 1d6+3 P R30/120); Mace (+8 1d6+3 B); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +16
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Deadly Strike: Can automatically crit on a successful melee attack made with advantage once per short rest
Fast Hands: Can use the Cunning Action bonus action to use Sleight Of Hand, disarm a trap, open a lock, or Use An Object
Silencing Strike: Melee hit silences the target (save DC 14 Constitution negates) for 1 min once per short rest
Sneak Attack: Once per turn, inflicts +8d6 HP on an attack using a finesse or ranged weapon with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage taken from a seen attacker by half
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +1; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +8; Intelligence: +6; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +4
Save Notes:
Slippery Mind: Save Proficiency (Wisdom)
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
